Composite case studies

What happens when B2B teams actually deploy Claude.

Twelve composite case studies across SaaS, agencies, consulting, healthcare, legal, manufacturing, e-commerce, nonprofit, architecture, real estate, and financial services. Each one synthesizes patterns we have seen repeatedly across similar engagements — so the patterns and outcomes are real even when the names and exact numbers are illustrative.

What is a composite case study? A synthesis of patterns we have seen repeatedly across similar engagements. Specific names, numbers, and details are illustrative; the patterns and outcomes reflect real client results. We use composites so we can be specific about what worked without compromising client confidentiality.

All case studies

Browse by industry & outcome

SaaS
70%
less proposal time
12-person SaaS team cut proposal time 70%
B2B SaaS, ~$3M ARR. Proposals dropped from 6-hour drafts to 90-minute reviews; sales cycle compressed 11 days.

content per writer
B2B marketing agency 2x’d content output
Mid-sized B2B agency rebuilt its content production workflow with Claude. Same headcount, double the throughput.

qualified opps per partner
